app.name: MediScan AI
app.metaTitle: MediScan AI — Medical Artificial Intelligence Platform
app.metaDesc: MediScan AI — an intelligent medical assistant platform with AI diagnostics, appointment management, and clinical reports.

hero.subtitle: MediScan AI delivers a high-fidelity clinical environment powered by seven precision AI services — from medical imaging to lab report analysis — achieving up to 99.39% diagnostic accuracy.

models.title: Seven AI Services. One Platform.
models.subtitle: Every diagnostic tool is powered by state-of-the-art deep learning, trained on clinical datasets, and accessible in seconds.
models.brainDesc: Advanced MRI segmentation with Xception CNN deep learning for early-stage tumour identification across 4 classes.
models.breastDesc: Ultrasound & mammography analysis for benign/malignant classification using DenseNet121 with 3-channel fusion and TTA.
models.skinDesc: Dermoscopic image classification across multiple lesion categories using dual ViT-Base ensemble models.
models.xrayDesc: Automated pneumonia, COVID-19, effusion, and anomaly detection from plain chest radiographs.
models.labDesc: Extract, structure, and interpret clinical lab values from scanned reports using EasyOCR + AI analysis.
models.chatDesc: Contextual medical Q&A using CRAG-inspired RAG with hybrid BM25 + FAISS retrieval and Qwen 2.5 72B.
models.reportDesc: RAG-powered comprehensive medical history report generation with bilingual output — Arabic for patients, English for doctors.

features.title: Complete Clinical Platform
features.subtitle: Beyond AI diagnostics — manage appointments, medical records, reports, and clinical workflows in one unified system.
features.schedulingDesc: Appointment booking with doctor availability, time slots, and admin walk-in support.
features.aiReportsDesc: RAG-powered medical history reports with bilingual output — Arabic for patients, English for doctors.
features.medicinesDesc: Chronic disease-aware medicine safety checker with real-time interaction alerts.
features.childrenDesc: Pediatric AI diagnostic tools for assessing childhood health indicators.
features.adminDesc: Doctor management, system analytics, and walk-in appointment booking for administrators.
features.rolesDesc: Three-role architecture — Patient, Doctor, and Admin — each with tailored dashboards.

about.title: Built for Clinicians. Designed for Patients.
about.desc: MediScan AI serves three roles in one unified platform: patients managing their health, doctors reviewing AI-assisted diagnostics, and administrators orchestrating clinical operations — all secured with end-to-end encryption.

landing.footer: AI-assisted diagnostics — not a substitute for professional medical advice.
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: Read genuine reviews from users who experienced MediScan AI.

brainTumor.title: Brain Tumer Examination
brainTumor.subtitle: 5-step assessment for brain tumor screening
brainTumor.step1Instruction: Please stand with your feet together, arms at your sides. Now close your eyes and try to stay still for 30 seconds.
brainTumor.step1Hint: Observe any swaying, loss of balance, or need to open eyes early.
brainTumor.step2Instruction: Extend your arm fully, then touch the tip of your nose with your index finger. Repeat several times, then try with eyes closed.
brainTumor.step2Hint: Watch for tremor, overshoot, or inability to accurately touch the nose.
brainTumor.step3Instruction: Keep your head still. Follow my finger with your eyes only as I move it in an H-pattern.
brainTumor.step3Hint: Note any nystagmus, jerky movements, or inability to track smoothly.
brainTumor.step4Instruction: Hold both arms extended in front of you, palms facing up. Close your eyes and hold for 20 seconds.
brainTumor.step4Hint: Observe if one arm drifts downward or rotates inward (pronates).
brainTumor.step5Instruction: Ask the patient: How are you today? Any headaches upon waking? Can you name [a familiar person or place]?
brainTumor.step5Hint: Note any confusion, difficulty finding words, or inappropriate responses.

breastSelf.title: Breast Cancer Self-Examination
breastSelf.subtitle: 6 steps · ~3 minutes
breastSelf.step1Instruction: Stand facing a mirror with your arms raised. Notice any changes in the shape or size of both breasts.
breastSelf.step2Instruction: Lower your arms and press firmly on your hips. Notice any changes in shape.
breastSelf.step3Instruction: Move slowly from side to side. Look for changes in: breast shape and size, nipple shape and size, skin appearance (dimpling, puckering, redness).
breastSelf.step4Instruction: Using the pads of your three middle fingers, feel both breasts and surrounding areas in circular motions, checking for any lumps or changes.
breastSelf.step5Instruction: Gently press each nipple to check for any abnormal discharge.
breastSelf.step6Instruction: Lie on your back and repeat the palpation and nipple checks. This position helps spread the breast tissue.

skinSelf.title: Skin Lesion ABCDE Check
skinSelf.subtitle: 5 steps · ~2 minutes
skinSelf.step1Instruction: Is the mole or lesion symmetric? Draw an imaginary line through the middle — do both halves match?
skinSelf.step2Instruction: Are the edges irregular, ragged, notched, or blurred?
skinSelf.step3Instruction: Is the color uneven? Look for multiple shades of brown, black, red, white, or blue.
skinSelf.step4Instruction: Is it larger than 6mm (about the size of a pencil eraser)? Melanomas are usually larger.
skinSelf.step5Instruction: Has it changed in size, shape, color, or developed new symptoms like itching or bleeding?

landing.sectionSubtitle: Early detection saves lives — check yourself at home
landing.brainSubtitle: Know the warning signs — check yourself at home
landing.breastSubtitle: Monthly self-check — learn the right technique
landing.brainCompleteTitle: Your brain health check is complete! Thank you for taking care of yourself today 🌟
landing.brainCompleteMsg: If everything felt smooth and your balance was perfectly on track, that's amazing and you are good to go! However, if you noticed any slight difficulty or anything unfamiliar during the steps, there's absolutely no need to worry—simply consult a specialist to be 100% sure. Your peace of mind is our priority!
landing.breastCompleteTitle: Great job completing your monthly check today! 🌸
landing.breastCompleteMsg: If everything felt completely normal and you didn't notice any lumps or changes, that is wonderful and you are all set until next month! But remember, if you ever spot or feel anything different or unusual while following the video guide, stay calm—it is simply a sign to gently reach out to your doctor for a quick clinical check to stay completely reassured. Taking care of yourself is your superpower!

symptoms.descUrgent: One or more serious symptoms detected. Go to the ER immediately.
symptoms.descWatch: Symptoms require a doctor visit within 24 hours.
symptoms.descHome: Symptoms are mild. Monitor closely and rest.

dosage.warningText: Always consult a doctor. Do not exceed the maximum daily dose.

firstaid.head: Head Injury
firstaid.feverStep1: Undress child to a single layer
firstaid.feverStep3: Apply cool (not cold) damp cloth to forehead
firstaid.feverStep5: Seek emergency care if fever > 40°C or lasts > 3 days
firstaid.chokingStep4: Do not perform blind finger sweeps
firstaid.chokingStep5: Call emergency if object not removed in seconds
firstaid.burnsStep1: Cool under running water for 20 min
firstaid.burnsStep2: Do NOT use ice, butter, or toothpaste
firstaid.burnsStep3: Cover loosely with clean cling wrap
firstaid.burnsStep4: Seek care for burns > 1 palm size
firstaid.burnsStep5: Call emergency for chemical or electrical burns
firstaid.allergicStep3: Lay child flat with legs elevated
firstaid.allergicStep4: Recovery position if unconscious and breathing
firstaid.cutsStep5: Seek care if wound is deep, gaping, or bleeding persists
firstaid.headStep2: Apply ice pack wrapped in cloth for 20 min
firstaid.headStep4: Seek emergency if unconscious, vomiting, or seizure
